title: Wasabi(outdate)
description: This mod is add Japanese Themed Illager!
body:
# Wasabi(outdate)

It will planning to move to bagus mod!

 ![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9j9b0n7u/images/0c49e3c113f627c97733b42f58557c9b4118b92d.png)

### Summary👺

This mod is simple.

add Japanese Themed Illager!

when Tengu find you. fly for you....

 

### How to find them?

Currently You can find them in Raid!

don't forget protect villager from tengu

 

### Planned Feature

new Illagers
